title.en: Chaos Arcana is born out of chaos, and there ar...

content.en:
Ye Tian had always thought that the Ancient Demon Tower was a super-grade supreme treasure, even if it was more powerful than the normal super-grade supreme treasure and the super-grade chaos spirit treasure, it still belonged to the category of super-strong supreme treasure.

But now, after refining the Ancient Demon Tower, he knew that the Ancient Demon Tower was not a supreme treasure, but a realm treasure that had not grown.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't know what the Boundary Treasure was, but after becoming the Dao Ancestor's personal lineage, he gained a lot of knowledge from the Void Heaven Palace, among which there was news about the Boundary Treasure.

The Realm Treasure corresponds to the Chaos Arcana, and it is not even bad at all.

Chaos Arcana is born out of chaos, and there are also forged Chaos Arcana.

The realm treasure is different, the realm treasure cannot be forged, it can only be conceived by the great universe, but the great universe is so rare, and it takes a long time to be able to conceive.

One hundred thousand pieces of the strongest treasure are far less than a realm treasure, in bad words, the strongest treasure and the chaos spirit treasure are not worth anything at all, those heavenly monarchs of the Heavenly Mandate realm can't look down on them at all, and even those powerful gods and generals can't look down on the ordinary supreme treasures and chaos spirit treasures.

For example, those six- and seven-star god generals, the worst weapons they use are also the best Chaos Spirit Treasures, or even super Chaos Spirit Treasures, and some God generals with unusual identities even have Chaos Treasure in their hands.

For example, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, Ye Tian was sure that the other party definitely had a Chaos Treasure, or even more than one.

Ye Tian himself didn't have the Chaos Arcana, and he couldn't buy it, because the Chaos Arcana was also relatively scarce in the chaos, and the Chaos Arcana bred by heaven and earth was very difficult to see, and there were not many forged Chaos Arcana, only those powerful refiners could forge the Chaos Arcana with rare materials.

There are too many Heavenly Monarchs in Chaos, resulting in a shortage of Chaos Arcana.

Although the value of the Chaos Arcana is far inferior to that of the Half-Dao Weapon, it is also precious, and few people are willing to sell the Chaos Arcana.

Therefore, Ye Tian currently has no way to get the strength of the Chaos Treasure to arm himself, but now he has obtained a half-finished realm treasure.

Strictly speaking, the semi-finished realm treasure could not give Ye Tian much value, after all, his wealth far exceeded a large number of Chaos Treasures, but if the semi-finished realm treasure became a realm treasure, the increase in Ye Tian's strength would be very large, even more than the Chaos Treasure.

Because the gods will not be able to exert the power of the Chaos Arcana, one-fifth of the power will not be able to exert it, and only the powerhouses of the Heavenly Destiny Realm can exert the power of the Chaos Arcana.

This is because the Heavenly Mandate Realm Heavenly Monarch has the power of chaos, and the divine power has been completely transformed into the power of chaos, and the Chaos Arcana contains the power of chaos.

And the power of the god general is a bit inconsistent with the Chaos Arcana, so it is difficult to exert the power of the Chaos Arcana.

But the Boundary Treasure is different, the Boundary Treasure does not contain the power of chaos, but the power of the world.

Ye Tian's cultivation system is a small universe, and he actually uses divine power and world power, so he can fully exert the power of the realm treasure.

Therefore, in the great universe, the native beings can fully exert the power of the Realm Treasure.

For example, a Divine General in the early stage of the Seven Stars, if he is holding a Boundary Treasure, he can easily defeat or even kill a Chaos Divine General in the middle of the Seven Stars.

Ye Tian is now an eight-star late-stage god general, if he has a realm treasure, it is enough to fight head-on with an eight-star peak god general without falling behind, and he does not need to rely on consumption to grind the other party to death.

Ye Tian knew that he would stay at the Divine General level for a long time, so the Realm Treasure meant a lot to him.

"There are many ways for a Half Realm Treasure to cultivate into a Boundary Treasure, and the easiest way to do this is to devour a large amount of the Supreme Treasure and increase its World Origin Power. The reason why the Ancient Demon Tower couldn't grow into a realm treasure was because it was born during the fusion of the two universes, and if it was born after the formation of the great universe, it would be a realm treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Xeon Treasure is useless to him now, and he can't sell it, he now has a bunch of Xeon Arcana in his hands, and the Terran is not short of Xeon Arcanta.

Immediately, Ye Tian threw all these supreme treasures into the Ancient Demon Tower, and let the ancient demon tower's machine spirit devour these supreme treasures.

The origin space of the Ancient Demon Tower.

One by one, the strongest treasures were shattered, turning into essence of energy and refining the entire Ancient Demon Tower.

Gradually, the power of the Ancient Demon Tower became stronger and stronger, and it got closer and closer to the Boundary Treasure.

A piece of the strongest treasure!

Ten Treasures!

100 pieces of the strongest treasure!

......

Tens of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tian has consumed a total of 219 Supreme Treasures, all of which have been devoured by the Ancient Demon Tower.

Finally this day.

The Ancient Magic Tower has completed its metamorphosis.

The Ancient Demon Tower was transformed in the Void Heaven Temple, and the Void Heaven Hall was a half-way weapon, and it was the top half-way weapon, and all the fluctuations in the promotion of the Ancient Demon Tower were suppressed by it.

Otherwise, the birth of a realm treasure will definitely cause a huge sensation.

After a long time, the transformation of the Ancient Demon Tower was completed, turning into an even darker small tower, and powerful world rules permeated from it, making people tremble.

Ye Tian stared at the Ancient Demon Tower, his heart was extremely excited.

"The Ancient Demon Tower has finally become a realm treasure!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Ancient Demon Tower is a realm treasure that has the three major abilities of defense, suppression, and devouring, which is very helpful in battle.

With the Realm Treasure Level Ancient Demon Tower, Ye Tian's strength has increased again, if he encounters an eight-star peak god general, it won't take long for him to kill and deal with it.

Of course, the kind of top-notch and most rebellious eight-star peak god general, he thinks that he is not an opponent yet, at most he can protect himself.

---------

The universe, a barren region.

A young man is looking for the area.

The Great Universe is too big, and there are too few living beings, even those top Heavenly Monarchs can't explore the entire Great Universe, so the process of exploring the Great Universe by the major forces has been going on.

This young man is one of the explorers, exploring this uncharted area.

And he was a member of the original Tibetan God Temple-Zhang Ling Divine General!

Compared with the past, Zhang Lingshen is living a worse life now, and it can even be said that it is very difficult.

His talent is not good in the first place, and he is only a two-star god general in the chaos, and he is still a big man in the small chaos continent, but in the entire chaos, he is like an ant.

And now that the Great Universe has gathered the top Heavenly Monarchs in the chaos and a large number of seven or eight-star god generals, not to mention that he has been reincarnated in the Great Universe, even if it is his cultivation in his previous life, it is nothing at all.

So far, he has only barely stepped into the strength of the late stage of the second star now, and this is still some chance for him, plus he has taken refuge in a big force, so as not to obtain a little good exercise.

But he has no status at all in that big force, so he can only do errand tasks.

Now, he has been sent to explore the boundless uncharted regions of the universe.

"Hey, what's that......"

Zhang Ling's gaze saw a purple light through a long distance, and when he got closer, he realized that it was the light emitted by a world.

The world that radiates purple light proves that this world is not ordinary.
